Part.Source:
Event Start
&CteModRodCol = Status_SimNao.Nao//default TablePed.Visible = False &CtePosDup = Status_SimNao.Nao
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
&CtePosDup.TooltipText = "Possui Duplicatas"
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &EmpCod.Visible = False &CteVlrRecSer.Visible = False &TotalMoeda.Visible = False GridColetas_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridColetas.InternalName GridColetas.Rows = Page.Rows &GridColetasCurrentPage = 1 &GridColetasCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridColetasPageCount = -1 GridDuplicata_Empowerer.GridInternalName = GridDuplicata.InternalName GridDuplicata.Rows = Page.Rows &GridDuplicataCurrentPage = 1 &GridDuplicataCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridDuplicataPageCount = -1 GridColetasPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridColetas.Rows GridDuplicataPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = GridDuplicata.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//The variable '&GridColetasPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //The variable '&GridDuplicataPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar.
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&GridPageCount = GridDuplicata.PageCount RetornaTotalDuplicatasCTe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, &DinCreVlrDup, &CarCreVlrDup, &CarDebVlrDup, &DupCreVlrDup, &TotalMoeda ) &Diferenca = &CteVlrRecSer - &TotalMoeda
EndEvent
Event GridColetas.Load
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteColCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod
&CteColCod = CteColCod &CteColOcc = CteColOcc &CteColCnpj = CteColCnpj &CteColCodInt = CteColCodInt &CteColDta = CteColDta &CteColIe = CteColIe &CteColFon = CteColFon &CteColUfe = CteColUfe
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
load EndFor
EndEvent
Event GridDuplicata.Load
&GridCteDupCod = CteDupCod &gridCteDupNro = CteDupNro &gridCteDupDtaVct = CteDupDtaVct &gridCteDupVlr = CteDupVlr
&gridCteTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Nao if not CteDupCreSeq.IsEmpty() and Not CteDupCreSeq.IsNull() RetornaStatusDuplicata.call(EmpCod, CteDupFilCod, CteDupCreSeq, &gridCteTmpSts) EndIF
&gridCteDupCod = CteDupCod &gridCteDupCreSeq = CteDupCreSeq &gridCteDupFiLCod = CteDupFilCod
&gridCteDupNro = CteDupNro &gridCteDupVlr = CteDupVlr &gridCteDupCbrCod = CteDupCbrCod &GridCteDupDtaVct = CteDupDtaVct
if &gridCtePedTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Sim &DeleteDuplicata.Enabled = 0 &gridCteDupNro.Enabled = 0 CteDupDtaVct.Enabled = 0 &gridCteDupVlr.Enabled = 0 &gridCteDupCbrCod.Enabled = 0 Else &DeleteDuplicata.Enabled = 1 &gridCteDupNro.Enabled = 1 CteDupDtaVct.Enabled = 1 &gridCteDupVlr.Enabled = 1 &gridCteDupCbrCod.Enabled = 1 EndiF
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &DeleteDuplicata.FromImage(ActionDelete) &DeleteDuplicata.TooltipText = "Deletar Duplicata"
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridColetasPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridColetasPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridColetasCurrentPage -= 1 GridColetas.PreviousPage() Case GridColetasPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridColetasCurrentPage += 1 GridColetas.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridColetasPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridColetasCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridColetas.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridColetasPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
GridColetas.Rows = GridColetasPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridColetasCurrentPage = 1 GridColetas.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridDuplicataPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridDuplicataPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridDuplicataCurrentPage -= 1 GridDuplicata.PreviousPage() Case GridDuplicataPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridDuplicataCurrentPage += 1 GridDuplicata.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridDuplicataPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridDuplicataCurrentPage = &PageToGo GridDuplicata.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridDuplicataPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
GridDuplicata.Rows = GridDuplicataPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridDuplicataCurrentPage = 1 GridDuplicata.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Enter
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True &CountCol = 0 &CountMot = 0 ValidaColetasCte.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&CountCol)
Do Case Case &CteModRodCol = Status_SimNao.Sim and &CountCol < 1 and &CountCol > 10 msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'CT-e com coletas, favor informar as coletas com no mínimo 1 e no máximo 10 Qtde!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False Case &CteModCod = '67' and &CteModRodTaf.Trim().IsEmpty() and &CteModRodNroRegEst.Trim().IsEmpty() msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Uma das informações devem estar preenchidas, TAF ou Registro Estadual!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False Case &CteModCod = '67' and not &CteModRodTaf.Trim().IsEmpty() and not &CteModRodNroRegEst.Trim().IsEmpty() msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Somente uma das informações devem estar preenchidas, TAF ou Registro Estadual!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False
Case &CteModCod = '67' and &CteDtaHorVia < &CteDtaHorEms and &CteTipFrt = tipoFretamento.Eventual msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Data e hora da viagem, NÃO pode ser menor que a data e hora de emissão do CTe!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False
Case &CtePosDup = Status_SimNao.Sim and &Diferenca <> 0 msg( DVMessageBasicNotification.Udp(!"Erro!", 'Valor das duplicatas não confere verifique!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True) ) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndCase
If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult AND not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' WPCte(!'Modal', !'Avancado', false) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndIf
EndEvent
Event 'WizardPrevious'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WPCte(!'Modal', !'ValorImp', true)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoInsertOrdemColeta'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoInsertDuplicata'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
wpAdicionarDuplicataCte.PopUp(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod) Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
RetornaTotalDuplicatasCTe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, &DinCreVlrDup, &CarCreVlrDup, &CarDebVlrDup, &DupCreVlrDup, &TotalMoeda ) &Diferenca = &CteVlrRecSer - &TotalMoeda
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
If 1 = 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Modal.EmpCod &DupCreVlrDup = &WizardData.Modal.DupCreVlrDup &DinCreVlrDup = &WizardData.Modal.DinCreVlrDup &CarCreVlrDup = &WizardData.Modal.CarCreVlrDup &CarDebVlrDup = &WizardData.Modal.CarDebVlrDup &Diferenca = &WizardData.Modal.Diferenca &CteVlrRecSer = &WizardData.Modal.CteVlrRecSer &TotalMoeda = &WizardData.Modal.TotalMoeda &CteModRodTaf = &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodTaf &CteModRodNroRegEst = &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodNroRegEst &CteTipFrt = &WizardData.Modal.CteTipFrt &CteDtaHorVia = &WizardData.Modal.CteDtaHorVia &CteModRodRNTRC = &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodRNTRC &CtePosDup = &WizardData.Modal.CtePosDup &CteModRodCol = &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodCol
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Geral.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Geral.FilCod &CteCod = &WizardData.Geral.CteCod
do 'Load' EndIf
if &CteCod.IsEmpty() wwCTE.Link() Endif
EndSub
Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData'
If 1 = 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Modal.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Modal.DupCreVlrDup = &DupCreVlrDup &WizardData.Modal.DinCreVlrDup = &DinCreVlrDup &WizardData.Modal.CarCreVlrDup = &CarCreVlrDup &WizardData.Modal.CarDebVlrDup = &CarDebVlrDup &WizardData.Modal.Diferenca = &Diferenca &WizardData.Modal.CteVlrRecSer = &CteVlrRecSer &WizardData.Modal.TotalMoeda = &TotalMoeda &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodTaf = &CteModRodTaf &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodNroRegEst = &CteModRodNroRegEst &WizardData.Modal.CteTipFrt = &CteTipFrt &WizardData.Modal.CteDtaHorVia = &CteDtaHorVia &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodRNTRC = &CteModRodRNTRC &WizardData.Modal.CtePosDup = &CtePosDup &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodCol = &CteModRodCol &WizardData.Modal.GridColetas.Clear() For Each Line in GridColetas &GridColetasItem = new() &GridColetasItem.CteColCod = &CteColCod &GridColetasItem.CteColOcc = &CteColOcc &GridColetasItem.CteColNum = &CteColNum &GridColetasItem.CteColCnpj = &CteColCnpj &GridColetasItem.CteColCodInt = &CteColCodInt &GridColetasItem.CteColDta = &CteColDta &GridColetasItem.CteColFon = &CteColFon &GridColetasItem.CteColIe = &CteColIe &GridColetasItem.CteColUfe = &CteColUfe
&WizardData.Modal.GridColetas.Add(&GridColetasItem) EndFor &WizardData.Modal.GridDuplicata.Clear() For Each Line in GridDuplicata &GridDuplicataItem = new() &GridDuplicataItem.GridCteDupCod = &GridCteDupCod &GridDuplicataItem.GridCteDupNro = &GridCteDupNro &GridDuplicataItem.GridCteDupDtaVct = &GridCteDupDtaVct &GridDuplicataItem.GridCteDupVlr = &GridCteDupVlr &GridDuplicataItem.GridCteDupCbrCod = &GridCteDupCbrCod &GridDuplicataItem.GridCteDupCreSeq = &GridCteDupCreSeq &GridDuplicataItem.gridCteTmpSts = &gridCteTmpSts
&WizardData.Modal.GridDuplicata.Add(&GridDuplicataItem) EndFor &WizardData.Avancado.EmpCod = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.EmpCod &WizardData.Avancado.PesCod = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.PesCod &WizardData.Avancado.CteVlrAva = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteVlrAva &WizardData.Avancado.CteVlrAce = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteVlrAce &WizardData.Avancado.CteVlrCon = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteVlrCon &WizardData.Avancado.CteAveRam = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteAveRam &WizardData.Avancado.CteAveCodLim = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteAveCodLim &WizardData.Avancado.CteCpfMot = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteCpfMot &WizardData.Avancado.CteNomMot = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteNomMot &WizardData.Avancado.CteObsGer = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteObsGer &WizardData.Avancado.CteCiotNro = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteCiotNro &WizardData.Avancado.CteDocTra = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteDocTra &WizardData.Avancado.CteNroCon = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CteNroCon &WizardData.Avancado.CtePla = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CtePla &WizardData.Avancado.CtePlaTra = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CtePlaTra &WizardData.Avancado.CtePosVei = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CtePosVei &WizardData.Avancado.CtePosDocAnt = &EmptyWizardData.Avancado.CtePosDocAnt &WizardData.Avancado.GridDocAnt.Clear() &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else
&WizardData.Modal.CteModRodRNTRC = &CteModRodRNTRC &WizardData.Modal.CteModRodCol = &CteModRodCol &WizardData.Modal.CtePosDup = &CtePosDup &WizardData.Modal.GridColetas.Clear() For Each Line in GridColetas &GridColetasItem = new() &GridColetasItem.CteColCod = &CteColCod &GridColetasItem.CteColOcc = &CteColOcc &GridColetasItem.CteColNum = &CteColNum &GridColetasItem.CteColCnpj = &CteColCnpj &GridColetasItem.CteColCodInt = &CteColCodInt &GridColetasItem.CteColDta = &CteColDta &GridColetasItem.CteColFon = &CteColFon &GridColetasItem.CteColIe = &CteColIe &GridColetasItem.CteColUfe = &CteColUfe
&WizardData.Modal.GridColetas.Add(&GridColetasItem) EndFor &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
If &CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando GravaCteModal.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CteCod,&WizardData,&CteModRodNroRegEst,&CteModRodTaf,&CteTipFrt,&CteDtaHorVia) EndIf
EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If (&CteModCod = '57') AND &CteModRodRNTRC.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'RNTRC é obrigatório', DVMessageType.error, &CteModRodRNTRC.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&CteTipSer = TiposervicoCte.TransportePessoas and &CteModCod = '67') AND &CteTipFrt.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Fretamento'), DVMessageType.error, &CteTipFrt.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&CteTipSer = TiposervicoCte.TransportePessoas and &CteModCod = '67' and &CteTipFrt = TipoFretamento.Eventual) AND &CteDtaHorVia.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Data e Hora da Viagem'), DVMessageType.error, &CteDtaHorVia.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If &CteTipSer = TiposervicoCte.TransportePessoas and &CteModCod = '67' CteTipFrt_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else CteTipFrt_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf If Not (&CteTipFrt = TipoFretamento.Eventual) &CteDtaHorVia.Visible = False CteDtaHorVia_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &CteDtaHorVia.Visible = True If &CteTipSer = TiposervicoCte.TransportePessoas and &CteModCod = '67' and &CteTipFrt = TipoFretamento.Eventual CteDtaHorVia_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 RequiredDataContentCell' Else CteDtaHorVia_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-6 DataContentCell' EndIf EndIf If &CteModCod = '57' CteModRodRNTRC_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-3 RequiredDataContentCell' Else CteModRodRNTRC_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-3 DataContentCell' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event &gridCteDupVlr.IsValid
do 'AtualizaDuplicata'
EndEvent
Event &gridCteDupNro.IsValid
do 'AtualizaDuplicata'
EndEvent
Event &gridCteDupCbrCod.IsValid
do 'AtualizaDuplicata'
EndEvent
Event &GridCteDupDtaVct.IsValid
do 'AtualizaDuplicata'
EndEvent
Event &CteTipFrt.IsValid
do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &CteModRodCol.Click
If &CteModRodCol = Status_SimNao.Sim GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.ShowTab(2) GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.selectTab(2) TableColetas.Visible = True Else TableColetas.Visible = False GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.HideTab(2) EndIf
EndEvent
Event &CtePosDup.Click
If &CtePosDup = Status_SimNao.Sim GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.ShowTab(1) GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.selectTab(1) TableDup.Visible = True Else TableDup.Visible = False GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.HideTab(1) EndIf
EndEvent
Event &DeleteDuplicata.Click
If &gridCteTmpSts = Status_SimNao.Nao DeletaCteDuplicata.call(EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod,CteDupCod) Gridduplicata.Refresh()
RetornaTotalDuplicatasCTe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, &DinCreVlrDup, &CarCreVlrDup, &CarDebVlrDup, &DupCreVlrDup, &TotalMoeda ) &Diferenca = &CteVlrRecSer - &TotalMoeda Else msg('Duplicatas já possui pagamentos, não é possível Eliminar/Alterar por aqui!') EndIF
EndEvent
Sub 'AtualizaDuplicata'
NovaDuplicataCTe_Tipo.Call('ALT', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, &gridCteDupCod, &gridCteDupNro, &GridCteDupDtaVct, &gridCteDupVlr, &gridCteDupCbrCod,0,&CteDupFrpPgtoCod)
RetornaTotalDuplicatasCTe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &CteCod, &DinCreVlrDup, &CarCreVlrDup, &CarDebVlrDup, &DupCreVlrDup, &TotalMoeda ) &Diferenca = &CteVlrRecSer - &TotalMoeda
EndSub
Sub 'Load'
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where CteCod = &CteCod &CteModCod = CteModCod &CteTipSer = CteTipSer &CtePosDup = CtePosDup &CteModRodCol = CteModRodCol &CteSts = CteSts
&CteVlrRecSer = CteVlrRecSer &CteDtaHorEms = YMDHMStoT(year(CteDtaEms),month(CteDtaEms),day(CteDtaEms),Val(substr(CteHorEms,1,2)),Val(substr(CteHorEms,4,2)))
If CteModRodCol = Status_SimNao.Sim or CtePosDup = Status_SimNao.Sim //possui duplciata ou coleta fica visivel TablePed.Visible = True Else TablePed.Visible = false EndIf
If CtePosDup = Status_SimNao.Sim GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.ShowTab(1) GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.selectTab(1) TableDup.Visible = True Else TableDup.Visible = False GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.HideTab(1) EndIf
If CteModCod = '57' &CteModRodRNTRC = CteModRodRNTRC If CteModRodCol = Status_SimNao.Sim GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.ShowTab(2) GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.selectTab(2) TableColetas.Visible = True Else TableColetas.Visible = False GXUITabsPanel_TabsPedCol.HideTab(2) EndIf TableOs.Visible = False TableRodo.Visible = True Else TableRodo.Visible = False
TableOs.Visible = True If CteIniUfe <> CteTerUfe &CteModRodTaf.Visible = true &CteModRodNroRegEst.Visible = false &CteModRodTaf = CteModRodTaf Else &CteModRodTaf.Visible = False &CteModRodNroRegEst.Visible = True &CteModRodNroRegEst = CteModRodNroRegEst EndIf
&CteTipFrt = CteTipFrt If &CteTipFrt.isempty() &CteTipFrt = TipoFretamento.eventual EndIF
&CteDtaHorVia = CteDtaHorVia EndIf
do 'AttributesSecurityCode' exit EndFor
EndSub
